content:
🌿 June 2026: The Reality of the Balance.
If I told you this month was flawless, I’d be lying.

The Truth? 

Balancing articleship with CA Final prep is a massive reality check.

There are days I come home completely exhausted, look at the books, and my brain just says: “Maan nahi kar raha.”😭
and Yes, I have observed that lately I am procastinating a lot which I aim to improve in July🥲🤞🏻.

Some weeks feel less like "thriving" and more like just trying to keep my head above water. Tbh, it's more like bs yeh week ho jaye next wale se I will be better- I am better till Thrusday then energy goes down and I procastinate again🫠

But amidst the fatigue, June was still a month of solid growth. I'm learning to accept that progress isn't a straight line.🤧 It's literally Full of Ups and Downs.

Even on the days I can only manage an hour of studying, or the days where my only win is grasping a complex concept at work, it counts. (Yeah, the Guilt Always Stay🥲)

Documenting this journey—sharing real articleship experiences, decoding businesses, and analyzing scandals—has been my creative escape when the routine gets heavy.🌱✨ 

A genuine thank you to everyone who supports me in my journey, reads my breakdowns, and keeps me moving forward. 🙌

Shoutout to those who constantly show up and engage:

CA Somya Gupta PRANJAL TILOKANI Shreya Rajoriya Saksham Singhal Daksh Goel Yogita Bohra Deep Burman Shaurya S. Uttam Kumar simran K. Jiya Saluja Mansvi Agal Kareena Kapoor Palak Gupta Mridul gupta Vaibhav Rai Harshal Kesharwani Vivek Yadav Shruti Singhal Shruti Jain Aabhas Mehta Aakshi Garg Avani Soni Shruti Jain Parth Anand Sonabh Kinshuk Harshil Thakkar Pratik Agarwal Jatin Prakash Dhiman Kiranpreet Kaur Nitya Karadiya SANJEEV K. Aazam Akhtar Kishore Kumar Muskan Khowal Hitesh Agarwal Aman Chauhan Jenish Dabhi Aryaman Goel 

(If your name isn't here, please know I’m incredibly grateful for you too. It’s tough out here, but your support makes a huge difference 🌻😭)

No sugarcoating, just real grind. Let’s see what July brings. 🫧
And I will make it better for sure🤞🏻

comment: In articleship, daily study targets often break because workdays aren’t predictable. A weekly rolling buffer with planned low-energy days usually reduces the guilt-procrastination loop.
